data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Optimizes decision-making for users by simplifying choices.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design language with simple navigation.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are positioned to be easily accessible.
data.technical_spec: Optimize button placement and touchscreen interfaces.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistency with user expectations to improve experience.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements to increase comprehension.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits for information load on user's working memory.
